testcase.name: test_list_tenants_unauthorized

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 200 assert 200 in [401, 403] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_tenants_api.py:75: in test_list_tenants_unauthorized assert response.status_code in [401, 403], f"Expected 401/403, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401/403, got 200 E assert 200 in [401, 403] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_tenant_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 in [200, 201] + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_tenants_api.py:100: in test_create_tenant_success assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 in [200, 201] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_tenant_duplicate_email

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 400 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_tenants_api.py:141: in test_create_tenant_duplicate_email assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 400 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
